title: Eva in Super Robot Wars Z
display_title: Eva in Super Robot Wars Z
wikitext:
[]: Eva in Super Robot Wars Z             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Dec 24, 2013 1:42 pm http://www.animenewsnetwork.com/news/2013-12-24/3rd-super-robot-wars-z-ps3/vita-game-revealed "Namco Bandai Games announced the game during a livestream event on Tuesday. The livestream revealed that this will be the "final chapter" in the Super Robot Taisen Z series."

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Tue Dec 24, 2013 1:51 pm According to the list of robots, there won't be any Evangelions from 3.0, only 1.0 and 2.0, so no AAA Wunder as support for EVA-08, a shame.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Tue Dec 24, 2013 2:13 pm Wunder wouldn't be support. It's be it's own ship unit like all the other command ship. Would be nice to finally have Misato as a usable character when Q finally makes it into SRW.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Tue Dec 24, 2013 2:18 pm ^ Hell yes, just imagine the BGM switching to "The Anthem" while Misato screams to open fire, followed by the enemy being obliterated by a rain of railgun shells! But there's one thing I don't get : is that installment the very last SRW, or just of the Taisen Z series.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Tue Dec 24, 2013 2:21 pm If the default theme is The Anthem I'll go to the menu and switch it to The Ultimate Soldier. SRW never ends. They'll just start another series.

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Tue Dec 24, 2013 5:49 pm ElMariachi wrote: , only 1.0 and 2.0,

[]:             Quote Post by Jimbob » Tue Dec 24, 2013 6:13 pm Note this is part 1 of Z3. Like how Z2 was split into 2 parts. 3.0 will presumably be in part 2. Which begs the questions of if Mari will replace Asuka late game, and whether Shinji and Rei will be sticking around or if we will lose them before the finale, which is something SRW's done before, in fact in Z2 part 1 you lose Lockon from Gundam 00 and Suzaku from Code Geass for the rest of the game due to the plot.

[]:             Quote Post by Rei IV » Tue Dec 24, 2013 6:30 pm Damn, I wanted to see my beloved Kyuugouki/Marku.09 in something like this.

[]:             Quote Post by Dr. Nick » Wed Dec 25, 2013 5:57 am I'm going to assume this game is going to be mostly set-up for Z3.2, since the cast list at this point is entirely unsurprising. If I had to guess what entries Banpresto is going to use to make Z3.2 suitably epic, they're probably going to be Diebuster, Gurren Lagann's finale, the remaining Votoms sequels and the remaining Eva films, and I also keep hoping Gunbuster's 12 000 year timeskip might somehow allow Orguss 02 to sneak in. But we'll see. The animations in the PV look terribly unfinished, and I really hope they get polished before the game is released. The series not switching to full 2.5D sprite animation demonstrates well why Banpresto is one cheap damn studio.

[]:             Quote Post by Jimbob » Fri Feb 28, 2014 10:05 am http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OGLv6yM6O9U 2nd trailer out. Asuka sounds....off to me.

[]:             Quote Post by Dima » Sat Mar 08, 2014 4:04 pm ElMariachi wrote: But there's one thing I don't get : is that installment the very last SRW, or just of the Taisen Z series.

[]:             Quote Post by Jimbob » Tue Apr 15, 2014 5:57 pm Games out. Story covers all of 1.0 and most of 2.0 but doesn't get to the finale so no third impact, Beast mode Unit 02 or Godly Eva 01. However the preview for the next game shows the 2.0 ending, so that's gonna be in the sequel, and maybe 3.0 too. Only major interesting point is that you can chose not to activate Unit 03, and skip that fight and not have Asuka injured and keep her for the rest of the game. Otherwise she's replaced by Mari for the rest of it.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Tue Apr 15, 2014 6:15 pm ^ So that mean that Bardiel stays sleeping inside EVA-03 during the whole game?

[]:             Quote Post by artesox » Tue Apr 15, 2014 7:03 pm Jimbob wrote: Games out. Story covers all of 1.0 and most of 2.0 but doesn't get to the finale so no third impact, Beast mode Unit 02 or Godly Eva 01. However the preview for the next game shows the 2.0 ending, so that's gonna be in the sequel, and maybe 3.0 too. Only major interesting point is that you can chose not to activate Unit 03, and skip that fight and not have Asuka injured and keep her for the rest of the game. Otherwise she's replaced by Mari for the rest of it.

[]:             Quote Post by Jimbob » Tue Apr 15, 2014 7:45 pm ElMariachi wrote: ^ So that mean that Bardiel stays sleeping inside EVA-03 during the whole game?

[]:             Quote Post by Dima » Wed Apr 16, 2014 12:16 am Noooooo, i was at least expecting Beast mode for EVA-02.... No surprise that they didn't decide to include the 2.0 ending since this is part 1. Hopefully the next part will have playable the Unit-13 with Shinji+Kaworu as pilots.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Wed Apr 16, 2014 4:25 am ^ Pseudo-evolved EVA-13 vs pseudo-evolved EVA-01! It doesn't matter if it doesn't make sense, it's awesome and that all that matter!

[]:             Quote Post by Dima » Wed Apr 16, 2014 7:18 am ^ Hell yeah! Let's add EVA 08+02 cuz why not? It is a SRW game after all so anything is possible as long it is cool and awesome. Too bad they don't include mechs from manga and novels. We could get some amazing units from ANIMA. EDIT : All attacks of Shinji, Rei and Asuka with ENG subs Shinji :[url]http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QJFfwK0WlFY[/url] Asuka :[url]http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pDaZ-QUIADI[/url] Rei :[url]http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vDIKwWcLVD0[/url] Bonus scene: EVA-01 VS Angel 9 (no subs) [url]http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=am5C6hB184s[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Wed Apr 16, 2014 8:10 am ^ Pseudo-Evolved EVA-13 vs ARMAROS! EVA-02' vs Torwart α1! (the Asuka/EVA-02 Synthesis) There's also a video of all attacks of EVA-02 piloted by Mari : http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-UXjjaQ9PqE Unfortunately, the attacks are exactly the same than with Asuka, only the dialog change. And EVA-05 is not in the game? Also, I love how the robots glides on the battlefield as if it was made of soap! Or also how Rei's special attack is basically her saying "fuck it" and go charging her EVA-00 to bash the enemy with fists!

[]:             Quote Post by Dima » Sat Apr 19, 2014 12:49 pm ^ LOL totally forgot about Mari. Seems the thing i said before that we never get manga/novel units in SRW was not true. In Super Robot Wars Alpha 2 we got units from Crossbone Gundam. Of course this doesn't mean that we have any chance of getting ANIMA units but....... you never know. Also there is a rumour that says Z3-2 may be released this October. Personally i think it is too early. I am expecting a spring 2015 release.

The livestream revealed that this will be the "final chapter" in the Super Robot Taisen Z series."

Article: Eva in Super Robot Wars Z
24, 2013 6:13 pm Note this is part 1 of Z3. Like how Z2 was split into 2 parts. 3.0 will presumably be in part 2. Which begs the questions of if Mari will replace Asuka late game, and whether Shinji and Rei will be sticking around or if we will lose them before the finale, which is something SRW's done before, in fact in Z2 part 1 you lose Lockon from Gundam 00 and Suzaku from Code Geass for the rest of the game due to the plot.

If I had to guess what entries Banpresto is going to use to make Z3.2 suitably epic, they're probably going to be Diebuster, Gurren Lagann's finale, the remaining Votoms sequels and the remaining Eva films, and I also keep hoping Gunbuster's 12 000 year timeskip might somehow allow Orguss 02 to sneak in. But we'll see. The animations in the PV look terribly unfinished, and I really hope they get polished before the game is released. The series not switching to full 2.5D sprite animation demonstrates well why Banpresto is one cheap damn studio.
